name: youarememory
description: OpenClaw multi-level memory plugin with local-first storage and memos-style UI.

scripts.parity:check: npm run build --workspace @youarememory/openclaw-memory-plugin && python3 python-implementation/scripts/parity_check.py --query "项目进展" --db ~/.openclaw/youarememory/memory.sqlite --skills-dir ./packages/openclaw-memory-plugin/skills
